view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for in-person capacity and virtual attendance is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for in-person capacity and virtual attendance is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of having in-person capacity alongside virtual attendance. The linked use case specifies '15 in-person seats + 10 virtual slots', which directly supports the requirement of 'In-person capacity + unlimited (or capped) virtual'. Additionally, the evidence from prior steps confirms that the necessary resources and bookings have been created and are operational, indicating that the system can handle both in-person and virtual participants effectively.
